search_parameters.q: how to reset a frozen iphone

search_information.query_displayed: how to reset a frozen iphone

answer_box.title: If iPhone isn't responding, and you can't turn it off then on, try forcing it to restart.
answer_box.answer:
If iPhone isn't responding, and you can't turn it off then on, try forcing it to restart.
1. Press and quickly release the volume up button.
2. Press and quickly release the volume down button.
3. Press and hold the side button.
4. When the Apple logo appears, release the side button.
answer_list: Press and quickly release the volume up button.
Press and quickly release the volume down button.
Press and hold the side button.
When the Apple logo appears, release the side button.
